title: Obsidian Coffee Four Shot Editorial Series AI
sourceTitle: Obsidian Coffee Four Shot Editorial Series AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Four cohesive high-end realistic editorial visuals for LUMIA SCENT coffee brand. Subject: coffee bags, cans, and capsules appear across the series with a unified premium coffee identity and tagline Coffee for grown-ups who chase flavor. Scene: Dark mature studio coffee environment with steam, beans, packaging surfaces, product range arrangement, tight packaging detail, and lifestyle cup close-up. Composition: Fixed four-shot editorial set: hero brand poster with steam and beans / full product range / tight packaging detail / steaming cup lifestyle close-up, each shot cleanly composed as part of one cohesive brand campaign. Signature Elements: Preserved obsidian coffee four shot editorial series source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Cinematic premium coffee advertising, luxury sportswear-inspired maturity, photorealistic textures, controlled studio lighting, crisp materials, and ultra-polished editorial finish. Color Palette: Fixed obsidian black, dark coffee brown, warm steam highlights, cream label accents, subtle metallic shadows, and mature neutral contrast. Lighting: Dramatic yet controlled studio lighting with steam glow, packaging edge highlights, realistic cup reflections, and clean shadow structure. Typography: LUMIA SCENT appears as the main brand lettering; Coffee for grown-ups who chase flavor. appears on the tight packaging detail shot as readable premium copy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.title: Obsidian Coffee Four Shot Editorial Series Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Four cohesive high-end realistic editorial visuals for NOVA PETCARE coffee brand. Subject: matte coffee bags, black cans, espresso capsules, and tasting card appear across the series with a unified premium coffee identity and tagline Dark coffee for sharp mornings. Scene: Dark mature studio coffee environment with steam, beans, packaging surfaces, product range arrangement, tight packaging detail, and lifestyle cup close-up. Composition: Fixed four-shot editorial set: hero steam poster / complete product lineup / macro label detail / close-up cup with rising steam, each shot cleanly composed as part of one cohesive brand campaign. Signature Elements: Preserved obsidian coffee four shot editorial series source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Cinematic premium coffee advertising, luxury sportswear-inspired maturity, photorealistic textures, controlled studio lighting, crisp materials, and ultra-polished editorial finish. Color Palette: Fixed obsidian black, dark coffee brown, warm steam highlights, cream label accents, subtle metallic shadows, and mature neutral contrast. Lighting: Dramatic yet controlled studio lighting with steam glow, packaging edge highlights, realistic cup reflections, and clean shadow structure. Typography: NOVA PETCARE appears as the main brand lettering; Dark coffee for sharp mornings. appears on the tight packaging detail shot as readable premium copy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
